title: content: detect_quote_links allocates String for HashSet dedup when &str suffices
description: In detect_quote_links, seen is HashSet<String> and each match is inserted as url.to_string() (line 160). url is a &str with lifetime tied to the html parameter, which is borrowed for the full duration of the function. The set could be HashSet<&str>, avoiding one String allocation per unique URL seen.
